faqs.q: Do I need any design or technical experience?
faqs.a: None at all. The mentorship is built for complete beginners. Everything is taught step-by-step, from setting up the tools to creating your first AI content piece. If you can use a smartphone, you can do this.

faqs.q: What AI tools will I be using?
faqs.a: You'll learn the best available tools for each skill — covering AI image generation, video creation, avatar tools, voice cloning platforms, and more. Tools are always being updated as the AI space evolves.

faqs.q: Are the AI tools free or paid?
faqs.a: Most tools we teach have free tiers that are more than enough to get started. Some have paid options for higher volume — we'll guide you on exactly what you need based on your goals.

faqs.q: How long is the mentorship program?
faqs.a: There's no fixed end date — it's a lifetime mentorship. You get access to 24+ hours of pre-recorded content that grows over time, plus ongoing weekly 1-on-1 calls for as long as you're enrolled.

faqs.q: When are the weekly 1-on-1 calls scheduled?
faqs.a: Call times are scheduled individually based on your availability. Since it's truly 1-on-1 (not a group call), we find a time that works for you each week.

faqs.q: Can I use these skills to offer AI content as a service?
faqs.a: Absolutely — and many members do exactly this. Once you master AI product photography, videos, influencers, voice, and avatars, you can offer these as a high-value service to brands and agencies.

faqs.q: How much can brands realistically save using AI content?
faqs.a: Traditional content campaigns (shoots + influencers + video production) can cost Rs. 100,000–500,000+. With AI content skills, you can produce the same quality content at a fraction of that cost, repeatedly.

Yes — this is one of the core commitments of this mentorship. Whenever a new AI tool launches or something changes in the market, new lessons are added at no extra cost. You always have access to the latest.

faqs.q: What if I get stuck or have questions between calls?
faqs.a: That's exactly what the private Discord community is for. You can ask questions, share your work, and get feedback from both the coach and other members anytime — 24/7.

faqs.q: Is this a one-time payment or a subscription?
faqs.a: One-time payment of 4,999 PKR. No monthly fees, no hidden charges. You pay once and have lifetime access to everything — including all future updates.
